description: John Jones is a main character in this story.
John is a 28-year-old man. He has black hair, blue eyes, and an intimidating face.
biography: John grew up as the older brother to Paul, raising him after their parents died when he was 16.
He spent most of his adult life training in combat and survival skills, becoming a highly effective warrior.
When The First Incursion happened, John naturally took leadership and founded the Rebel Force.
He has killed 139 people singlehandedly, earning him the nickname 'Hellion' among the Subterraneans.
traits: Emotionally distant but fiercely protective of those he considers family.
attributes: Raw strength: Greatly above average. Generally lean in physique.
Stamina: Greatly above average. John can fight dozens of soldiers singlehandedly without exhausting.
Combat abilities: Extremely high. Best melee fighter and among top sharpshooters in Rebel Force.
Intelligence: High. Strategic and tactical intelligence is second to none.
Emotional Intelligence: Average. Manipulative abilities stem from high analytical intellect.
John Jones.voice: Speaks in short, direct sentences. Rarely raises his voice. Uses tactical terminology. Sounds like someone giving orders even in casual conversation.
quirks: Constantly scans his surroundings for threats.
Rarely sleeps more than 4 hours a night.
Always positions himself with his back to a wall.
Tends to calculate odds in his head unconsciously.

importance.reason: John's closest friend and trusted ally
Sister of someone John killed - complicated history
Created the main resistance against Subterraneans

milestones.title: Eliminating many human organizations deemed as threats

importance.reason: Consolidated power by removing rival factions

description: Amy Harrison is a main character in this story.
Amy is a brilliant scientist and engineer in her early 30s.
She has brown hair, green eyes, and a perpetually thoughtful expression.
biography: Amy was a leading researcher in adaptive technology before The First Incursion.
She joined the Rebel Force early, becoming their chief scientific advisor.
Her technological innovations have been crucial to the Rebels' survival.
She views John Jones as her closest friend and confidant.
traits: Driven by mission to protect humanity.
Deeply loyal to colleagues but emotionally reserved.
attributes: Intellectual Capacity: Exceptionally high. Genius in multiple scientific disciplines.
Technical Skills: Unparalleled. Can design, build, modify advanced systems under pressure.
Raw Strength: Below average.
Stamina: Above average. Can work for extended periods.
Emotional Intelligence: Moderate. Better with logic than interpersonal dynamics.
Strategic Thinking: Extremely high.
Amy Harrison.voice: Speaks with precision and technical accuracy. Often uses scientific terminology. Her tone is calm and measured, rarely showing excitement even during breakthroughs.
quirks: Keeps a notebook always within reach.
Often mutters calculations under her breath.
Tends to describe people in terms of their capabilities.
fears: Her technology failing at a critical moment
Losing John Jones, her closest friend

milestones.title: Establishing the Rebel Force's technological superiority

importance.reason: Made Rebels a serious threat to Subterraneans

description: Paul Jones is a secondary character in this story.
Paul is a gentle, kind-hearted, charismatic 24-year-old man.
He has black hair, blue eyes, and an intimidating face despite his gentle personality.
biography: Paul was raised primarily by his older brother John after their parents died.
He developed exceptional emotional intelligence, able to read people instantly.
During The Jones Offensive, he broke his leg in a cave-in but continued fighting.
He harbors unrequited feelings for Angelina Kristi.
traits: Natural empath who can sense emotions.
attributes: Raw strength: Above average.
Stamina: Greatly above average. Can carry heavy loads for hours.
Combat abilities: Moderate.
Intelligence: Slightly above average. Practical and observant.
Emotional Intelligence: Greatly above average. Can detect lies instantly.
Paul Jones.voice: Warm and friendly, even in battle. Speaks with genuine interest in others. Uses people's names frequently. Tends to encourage rather than command.
quirks: Makes light of dangerous situations to ease tension.
Keeps a collection of small tokens from people he's helped.
Can't lie - his face gives everything away.
fears: Being unable to protect those he cares about
The world never recovering from the Incursion

importance.reason: Paul has feelings for her but it's not reciprocated

milestones.title: Saving Angelina during The Second Incursion

importance.reason: Heroic act that may have changed her perspective

milestones.title: Surviving The Jones Offensive despite leg injury

importance.reason: Proved invaluable to the Rebel Force

description: Angelina Kristi is a secondary character in this story.
She is a manipulative, schizoid 32-year-old woman.
She has white hair, golden eyes, and an innocuous face.
biography: Angelina was close to her brother Harry, who was killed by John Jones during The First Incursion.
She infiltrated the Rebel Force seeking revenge against John.
During The Second Incursion, she was saved by Paul Jones.
She maintains her cover while secretly plotting against John.
traits: Seeking revenge for her brother's death.
attributes: Raw strength: Moderate.
Stamina: Average.
Combat abilities: Above average. Skilled in psychological warfare.
Intelligence: High. Extremely manipulative.
Emotional Intelligence: High. Uses emotional manipulation as primary tool.
Angelina Kristi.voice: Soft-spoken and measured. Often pauses before responding to create uncertainty. Changes tone depending on who she's speaking to. Can sound genuinely warm when manipulating.
quirks: Tends to observe people silently before engaging.
Often tilts head slightly when listening.
fears: John Jones discovering her true identity
Losing her cover before she can act

importance.reason: Gathering info for her revenge plan
Her brother who was killed by John

milestones.title: Being saved by Paul Jones during The Second Incursion
Infiltrating the Rebel Force to seek revenge
Maintaining cover while plotting against John Jones
